title: buddyholly007/syntaur
summary: Your personal AI platform — one binary, 88 tools, voice assistant, smart home, private by default. Written in Rust.

title: openyak/openyak
summary: OpenYak — open-source local AI agent for Windows, macOS, and Linux. A private, BYOK alternative to Claude Code, Claude for Work, and OpenAI Codex with 20+ tools, 100+ models via OpenRouter, MCP, and Ollama. Free, MIT-licensed, no telemetry.

title: AronMav/hydeclaw
summary: Self-hosted AI gateway for personal agents. Rust core + TypeScript channels + Python media hub. 28 LLM providers, 6 chat channels, multi-agent orchestration, long-term memory, encrypted secrets vault.

title: bjam24/modular-rag-assistant
summary: Modular RAG system with hybrid retrieval (FAISS + TF-IDF), reranking, and LLM-based generation using local models (Ollama).

title: azerozero/grob
summary: LLM proxy with built-in DLP and regulatory compliance. Redacts secrets before they reach the API. EU AI Act, GDPR, HDS/PCI DSS ready. Multi-provider failover, live TUI, virtual keys, fan-out. 6 MB, zero deps. Rust.

title: carlosvales/bolsa-ai-trading
summary: Trading bot combining technical analysis, ML signals (GradientBoosting), Kronos foundation model and self-hosted Ollama LLMs (gemma3 + deepseek-r1) via Telegram. 30 tests, Docker.

title: tanavc1/local-llm-autotune
summary: 39% faster TTFT and 3x reduction in RAM consumed by the KV cache for local LLMs. Zero-config optimization for Ollama, LM Studio, and Apple Silicon MLX.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: askalf/dario
summary: Local LLM router. One endpoint for Claude Max/Pro, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, Ollama, LiteLLM, any OpenAI-compat URL — your tools don't need to change. OAuth for Claude subscriptions, multi-account pool, MCP server. Zero runtime deps.

title: Bo1202/Aivy-OS
summary: Your own digital life form — local AI companion with persistent memory, IDE workspace, MCP support, and 30+ tools. Companion-first alternative to Hermes Agent / OpenClaw / Claude Code.

title: conorrusso/bandit
summary: Open-source AI agent for vendor privacy risk  assessment. Scores vendors across 8 GDPR/CCPA  dimensions using a published, enforcement-grounded  rubric. Works with Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Mistral,  or fully local with Ollama. Free forever.

title: ctala/ai-benchmarks-alternativos
summary: Benchmark abierto de 44 modelos LLM con 5,000+ tests reales. Alternativas a Claude, GPT-5 y Gemini para agentes N8N, OpenClaw y emprendedores. Calculadora interactiva + LLM-as-Judge Phi-4.

title: gh-haphong/voxagent
summary: Run a fully offline voice agent in your terminal to speak commands and get answers without sending data off your machine

title: recognisable-riddance165/Portable-Offline-LLM
